goal: MemoryOS Lite v3 — Letta-style benchmark usability for LongMemEval and LoCoMo

phases.name: Baseline Freeze And Case Harness
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 0 - Baseline Freeze And Case Harness

phases.name: Letta Gap Matrix And Contract Decisions
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 1 - Letta Gap Matrix And Contract Decisions

phases.name: Evidence Harness And Failure Taxonomy
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 2 - Evidence Harness And Failure Taxonomy

phases.name: Answer Projection And Citation Contract
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 6 - Answer Projection And Citation Contract

phases.name: Kernel, Tool, Approval, And Memory Mutation Loop
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 7 - Kernel, Tool, Approval, And Memory Mutation Loop

phases.name: Promotion Gate And Next Blueprint Decision
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 8 - Promotion Gate And Next Blueprint Decision

phases.name: Evidence Closure And Failure Replay
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 9 - Evidence Closure And Failure Replay

phases.name: Evidence Handoff And Context Selection
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 11 - Evidence Handoff And Context Selection

phases.name: Opt-In Kernel Memory Action Verification
phases.blueprint_heading: Phase 14 - Opt-In Kernel Memory Action Verification

benchmark_commands: DATA_DIR=.hermes-loop/work/${PHASE_ID:-manual}/eval_${RUN_ID:-run}_longmemeval MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

DATA_DIR=.hermes-loop/work/${PHASE_ID:-manual}/eval_${RUN_ID:-run}_locomo MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

DATA_DIR=.hermes-loop/work/${PHASE_ID:-manual}/eval_${RUN_ID:-run}_longmemeval MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge

DATA_DIR=.hermes-loop/work/${PHASE_ID:-manual}/eval_${RUN_ID:-run}_locomo MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge
